subcodes.first_line: O bewildered and enraptured one, praise thou God that thou art steadfast in the Covenant of Bahá'u'lláh and art radiant with the warmth of His dawning light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته سودائی بهاء الله حمد کن خدا را که ثابت میثاقی و نابت از حرارت اشراق
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @firmness in the Covenant
